---
name: Story
about: User or developer story
labels: ''
---

## Summary

Short description of the task.

Explain what needs to be implemented and why.

---

## Context

Provide background information about the problem or feature.

Explain how this relates to the project and what part of the system it affects.

---

## Goal

Describe the expected outcome of this task.

What should exist or work after this issue is completed?

---

## Scope

Describe what **is included** in this task.

- item
- item
- item

---

## Out of Scope

Describe what **should NOT be done in this task**.

This helps avoid scope creep.

- item
- item

---

## Implementation Notes

Optional notes about implementation ideas, architecture, or constraints.

Examples:

- libraries that might be used
- design decisions
- links to documentation

---

## Example

Provide examples if applicable.

Example CLI usage:

spm install react-performance

spm react audit

---

## Acceptance Criteria

Checklist that defines when this task is considered done.

- [ ] Feature implemented
- [ ] Code follows project structure
- [ ] Basic tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated
